batman.title: Batman Begins
batman.actors: Christian Bale, Michael Caine, Ken Watanabe, Liam Neeson
batman.plot: After witnessing his parents' death, Bruce Wayne learns the art of fighting to confront injustice. When he returns to Gotham as Batman, he must stop a secret society that intends to destroy the city.
batman.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 15 wins & 76 nominations.

batman.title: The Dark Knight
batman.actors: Christian Bale, Heath Ledger, Aaron Eckhart, Michael Caine
batman.plot: When the menace known as the Joker wreaks havoc and chaos on the people of Gotham, Batman must accept one of the greatest psychological and physical tests of his ability to fight injustice.

batman.title: The Dark Knight Rises
batman.actors: Christian Bale, Tom Hardy, Anne Hathaway, Gary Oldman
batman.plot: Eight years after the Joker's reign of anarchy, Batman, with the help of the enigmatic Selina Kyle, is forced from his exile to save Gotham City from the brutal guerrilla terrorist Bane.
batman.awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Film Award. Another 38 wins & 104 nominations.

spider-man.title: Spider-Man
spider-man.actors: Tobey Maguire, Willem Dafoe, Kirsten Dunst, James Franco
spider-man.plot: When bitten by a genetically modified spider, a nerdy, shy, and awkward high school student gains spider-like abilities that he eventually must use to fight evil as a superhero after tragedy befalls his family.
spider-man.awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. Another 16 wins & 62 nominations.

inception.title: Inception
inception.actors: Leonardo DiCaprio, Marion Cotillard, Ellen Page, Tom Hardy
inception.plot: A thief who steals corporate secrets through the use of dream-sharing technology is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of a C.E.O.

avengers.title: The Avengers
avengers.actors: Robert Downey Jr., Chris Evans, Scarlett Johansson, Jeremy Renner
avengers.plot: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team if they are going to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.
avengers.awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. Another 38 wins & 80 nominations.
